category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI for ImageOptim, ImageAlpha, and JPEGmini; official repository describes automated image optimization.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo and official GitHub repository identify the project as ImageOptim-CLI.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation surface; official GitHub README is also documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL, so repo discovery was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names the image optimization tools; official repository describes making image optimization part of automated build processes.
